pointsRewards.title: Points & Rewards

tierSystem.title: Tier System

aiRuns.title: AI That Runs It

smartInsights.title: Smart Insights

qrCheckins.title: QR Code Check-ins

referralProgram.title: Referral Program

howItWorks.title: Live in 60 seconds. Running forever.
howItWorks.subtitle: Describe your business. AI does the rest.

step1.title: Describe Your Business
step1.desc: "I run a coffee shop in Austin with regulars I want to reward." That's all we need. AI builds your custom loyalty program instantly.

step2.title: Share Your QR Code
step2.desc: Print it, display it at checkout, or share the link. Customers scan to join and start earning points immediately.

step3.title: AI Runs Your Program
step3.desc: Win-back campaigns. Birthday rewards. Streak bonuses. AI handles it all automatically—or asks for approval if you prefer.

step4.title: Get Weekly Insights
step4.desc: "Royalty sent 47 messages this week. 3 customers came back. 2 upgraded to Gold." See exactly what AI is doing for you.

templates.title: What Royalty runs automatically
templates.subtitle: Set it once. AI handles the rest—forever.

winBack.title: Win-Back Campaigns
winBack.desc: AI detects customers who haven't visited in 14+ days and automatically sends them a personalized offer to come back.

birthday.title: Birthday Rewards
birthday.desc: AI sends birthday rewards automatically when customers have a birthday coming up. Never miss a chance to delight.

streakBonuses.title: Streak Bonuses
streakBonuses.desc: 3-day streak? 7-day streak? 30-day streak? AI automatically awards bonus points and celebrates with customers.

tierMotivation.title: Tier Motivation
tierMotivation.desc: "You're 50 points from Gold!" AI sends encouraging messages when customers are close to leveling up.

milestones.title: Milestone Celebrations
milestones.desc: 10th visit? 50th? 100th? AI celebrates with customers and awards bonus points for loyalty milestones.

referralNudges.title: Referral Nudges
referralNudges.desc: AI identifies your happiest customers (Gold/Platinum) and nudges them to refer friends for bonus points.

testimonials.title: Local businesses love Royalty
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from businesses running loyalty on autopilot

quote1.text: "I set up Royalty in literally one minute. Now I get a weekly email showing me which regulars haven't been in, and AI automatically sends them offers. Our repeat visits are up 40% and I didn't do anything."
quote1.author: Maria Rodriguez
quote1.title: Owner, Casa del Sol Restaurant

quote2.text: "We tried a stamp card for years. Nobody tracked it. With Royalty, AI sends a message when someone hasn't been in 2 weeks — and they come back. It's like having a retention manager I never had to hire."
quote2.author: James Okafor
quote2.title: Owner, Peak Form Fitness Studio

quote3.text: "My regulars feel like VIPs now. They ask about their points, refer friends, come in just to hit a tier milestone. Royalty turned my checkout line into a conversation."
quote3.author: Sophie Tan
quote3.title: Owner, The Lemon Boutique

royaltyPro.title: Royalty Pro — Let Royal Run Your Marketing
royaltyPro.desc: Add Royal AI to your lifetime deal. Royal learns your business, creates automations, sends campaigns autonomously, and proves your marketing ROI.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about pricing
faq.a1: A customer is someone who joins your loyalty program. Each unique email or phone number counts as one customer, regardless of how many visits they make.
faq.a2: Royal is your AI marketing assistant. On Free, you get 20 queries/month to taste the AI. On Pro, Royal runs autonomously — learning your business, creating automations, and sending campaigns without asking. On Max, Royal also proves ROI by tracking which campaigns drive store visits.
faq.q3: Do I need a credit card to start?
faq.a3: No. You can start with our free plan or begin a 14-day trial of any paid plan without entering a credit card. Upgrade when you're ready.
faq.q4: What's the difference between LTD and subscriptions?
faq.a4: AppSumo Lifetime Deal (LTD) includes the loyalty platform and email campaigns forever. Subscription plans add Royal AI, SMS campaigns, and more features. LTD users can add Royalty Pro ($79/mo) to unlock full Royal AI, SMS, and white-label branding.
faq.a5: Yes! Upgrade or downgrade at any time. When upgrading, you'll be charged the prorated difference. When downgrading, you'll receive credit toward future billing.
faq.a6: White-label removes "Powered by Royalty" branding from your customer-facing loyalty app. Your customers see your brand only.
faq.a7: Yes! We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on subscriptions. AppSumo deals have a 60-day refund policy through their platform.
faq.a8: Yes! Each code increases your customer limit. Tier 1 = 500 customers, Tier 2 = 2,000 customers, Tier 3 = unlimited customers. Stack to reach the tier you need.

about.heroTitle: Your AI should know your Tuesday regulars by name
about.heroSubtitle: Most AI tools give you a chatbot. Royalty gives you an employee who knows every customer, every visit, and every pattern in your business — and acts on it, automatically.
about.problemTitle: Generic AI doesn't know your business
about.problemSubtitle: You ask it a question. It gives you a textbook answer. Nothing changes.
about.scenario1Generic: "Loyalty programs typically define best customers as those with the highest frequency of visits and average spend. Consider implementing a tier system to segment your top 20%..."
about.scenario1Royalty: Sarah Chen has visited 47 times, spends an average of $12, and always comes on Tuesdays. She hasn't been in for 11 days. Marcus Rivera just hit Gold tier — 3 referrals last month.
about.scenario2Question: "How do I bring back lapsed customers?"
about.scenario2Generic: "Consider sending a re-engagement email campaign with a special offer. Personalisation and urgency can help drive return visits. You could also try a win-back discount..."
about.scenario2Royalty: 8 Gold-tier customers haven't visited in 14+ days. I've already sent each of them a personalised offer based on their favourite items. 3 came back this week.
about.scenario3Generic: "Key metrics to track include customer lifetime value, churn rate, net promoter score, and average revenue per user. I'd recommend setting up a dashboard..."
about.scenario3Royalty: Your Tuesday lunch promotion drove 23 extra visits this month. Streak bonuses have a 67% retention rate. Birthday rewards have a 91% redemption rate. Your referral program brought in 12 new customers.
about.differenceTitle: AI that's built into your business, not bolted on
about.differenceSubtitle: Every check-in, every redemption, every referral teaches your AI something new about your business.
about.diff1Desc: Visit frequency, spending patterns, time-of-day preferences, tier progression. This isn't a generic model. It's YOUR model — built from your actual customer data.
about.diff2Desc: Generic AI tells you what you could do. Royalty does it. Win-back campaigns fire automatically. Birthday rewards send themselves. Streak bonuses celebrate your regulars without you lifting a finger.
about.diff3Desc: Royalty tracks which campaigns actually drove customers back through the door. Not clicks, not opens — visits. You know your exact return on every automated message.
about.learningTitle: A system that gets smarter every day
about.learningSubtitle: The longer you run Royalty, the better it gets at running your business.
about.step1Desc: Points earned, visit logged, streak tracked. Your AI now has one more data point about who your customers are and when they come in.
about.step2Desc: "This customer comes every Tuesday but hasn't been in for 2 weeks." Or: "5 customers just hit 100 visits this month." The system sees what you'd miss.
about.step3Desc: Sends a win-back offer, awards milestone bonus points, nudges a Gold member to refer a friend. Autonomously, or with your approval — you choose.
about.step4Desc: Did they come back? Did the offer work? Did the referral convert? Your AI adjusts and gets sharper. Every cycle, your program improves.
about.loopRepeat: This cycle runs every single day. You don't manage it. You don't think about it. You just see the results in your weekly summary.
about.resultsTitle: Your weekly summary — without doing anything
about.resultsSubtitle: Every week, Royal AI sends you a report on what it did, what worked, and what to try next.
about.summaryLine4: 12 new referrals from your Platinum members
about.suggestionText: Your Tuesday regulars respond best to streak bonuses. Consider increasing the 7-day streak reward from 25 to 50 points — projected to boost midweek visits by 15%.
about.ctaTitle: Stop paying for AI that doesn't know your business
about.ctaSubtitle: Royalty builds your loyalty program in 60 seconds — then runs it forever.

welcome.title: Welcome to Royalty — here's what we've prepared for you
welcome.automationsDesc: We've drafted 4 automations based on your business: Welcome Message, Visit Bonus, At-Risk Check-in, and Win-Back Offer. Review and activate the ones that fit your strategy.
